Exclusive | Streli Mamba wants to join FC Köln; AS Monaco were never interested

FC Köln are interested in signing 26-year-old Paderborn striker Streli Mamba and are currently working on a deal to sign the German.

Belgian 1st division side Cercle Brugge have also shown interest in signing the German.

Istanbul Basaksehir are making a move for St Étienne attacking midfielder Wahbi Khazri

France Football report that Turkish champions Istanbul Basaksehir are very interested in signing 29-year-old attacking midfielder Wahbi Khazri from Ligue 1 side St Étienne.

The Tunisian international is considering their approach and has a number of clubs in this country after him, having also received a proposal from Trabzonspor, which was a loan with a €3m option to buy.

Khazri scored 6 goals and laid on 4 assists last season, who is unsure about the Trabzon offer, who are cash strapped and can’t afford to match his ASSE salary, is more interested by the proposal from Basaksehir, who won the Turkish 1st division in 2019/20. Istanbul BB can offer a transfer fee, rather than a loan structure, which is attractive to Les Verts, who want to offload the ex-SC Bastia man, who is under contract with them until June 2022.

Napoli pondering options for defense: Romero & Senesi targeted

Napoli are active on the market, on top of pursuing targets for the winger position they are making plans in case either Koulibaly or Maksimovic depart in the coming weeks. The first target is Cristian Romero, who played at Genoa past two seasons and is owned by Juventus. Rino Gattuso has specifically asked the club to sign him, but Napoli face competition from Atalanta. Another name on sporting director Giuntoli's list is Marcos Senesi, born in 97 who currently plays for Feyenoord, while Fiorentina's German Pezzella can't also be excluded as a potential acquisition.

For the winger position Napoli are pondering options on both sides including Antonio Candreva as well Dinamo Zagreb's Carlos De Pena who has an Italian target. However the main target remains Jeremie Boga, but Sassuolo do not intend to lower their demands from their asking price of €40 million.

Dzeko, Milik, Under, Suarez: the latest on the 'dance' of the forwards

Four fowards and three teams involved. It is a "dance" of the fowards that could change jerseys between Juventus, Napoli and Roma. It starts with Cengiz Under's future, as Gattuso wants him as his winger at Napoli for the upcoming season. The Azzurri have not yet reached a deal with the player for a contract, which is the same situation between Milik and Roma - the possible replacement for Dzeko in case he leaves for Juventus.

Marseille interested in Japanese left-back Yuto Nagatomo

L’Équipe report that Ligue 1 side Marseille have a strong interest in 33-year-old Japanese international left-back Yuto Nagatomo, who has been a free agent since his contract with Turkish side Galatasaray expired in June.

OM had wanted to sign Caio Henrique (23) on loan from Atletico Madrid, but the Spanish side sold him to Ligue 1 rivals AS Monaco instead.

André Villas-Boas wants a player at left-back to provide back-up to Jordan Amavi.

Kévin Volland to arrive at Monaco on Tuesday

L’Équipe report that 28-year-old German attacker Kévin Volland will arrive at AS Monaco on Tuesday, when he is expected to undergo a medical ahead of a move from Bayer Leverkusen.

The fee for the German international will be less than €15m, according to the outlet mentioned above, as Volland has just 12 months remaining on his current contract.

The signing of Volland is not meant to suggest that Wissam Ben Yedder will be exiting the club, with Niko Kovać’s intention being to play the pair up top together. ASM are however continuing to seek an exit door for Keita Baldé.

Rennes look to Alphonse Areola in case of Édouard Mendy departure

As reported by Foot Mercato, Ligue 1 side Rennes are looking to French international goalkeeper Alphonse Areola as a potential replacement for goalkeeper Édouard Mendy, should the Senegalese international move to Chelsea, with the London club today submitting a second proposal to SRFC to sign the shot-stopper.

The 27-year-old spent the 2019/20 campaign on loan with Real Madrid from PSG, but has no intention of remaining with Les Parisiens as a second fiddle to Keylor Navas.

SRFC would be looking to do a deal with PSG in an initial loan agreement – the coming hours will likely be decisive in this matter.

Telegraph:
Mike McGrath's transfer notebook: Emiliano Martinez close to new Arsenal contract, Leeds eye Udinese midfielder
Plus: Chelsea are leading the race for Ajax teenager

Leeds United want to add Udinese midfielder Rodrigo De Paul to their summer spending for the Premier League season.

The Argentina intentional, 26, is a player Marcelo Bielsa believes can add quality to his squad as a player to unlock defences and is expected to cost at least £25million as he has a long-term contract with his Italian club.

Bielsa added Spain striker Rodrigo Moreno from Valencia and England Under-18 forward Sam Greenwood last week but the club are looking to recruit further.

De Paul is their first choice for a midfielder if a deal can be brokered for a player who has been at Udinese for four years after previous spells also at Valencia and Racing Club.

He has broken into the Argentina squad during his time in Italy and is now a regular in his national team.

Arsenal: Martinez could sign new deal at Emirates
Arsenal goalkeeper Emiliano Martinez is close to signing a new contract at the Emirates Stadium despite interest from Premier League rivals in offering a No.1 role.

Martinez, 27, has been back-up to Bernd Leno but came into Mikel Arteta's team to help win the FA Cup and the club want him to stay.

The Argentinian has two seasons left on his current contract but has been offered an extension and is expected to get game time next season.

West Ham: Crystal Palace and Fulham monitoring Josh Cullen
West Ham midfielder Josh Cullen is on the radar of Crystal Palace and Fulham.

The Republic of Ireland international, 24, has a year left on his current contract and will be available for a low fee.

He played regularly for Charlton in the Championship last season after helping them win promotion the year before while on loan.

Chelsea ahead in race for Ajax youngster
Chelsea are leading the race for Ajax teenager Amourricho van Axel Dongen.

Van Axel Dongen is not 16 until September but has been playing for his club's Under-18 team, which has sparked interest from the Premier League's top six clubs.

Manchester United and City have watched him play but Chelsea have a strong chance of bringing him to their Academy.

Milan-Tonali: the figures of the deal

Sandro Tonali will be come a new player at Milan after the player willed a deal between Brescia and the rossoneri. The transfer was agreed to with a formula of a €10m loan, plus a €15m purchase option, and a further €10m in bonuses tied to objectives and number of games played.

The formula is not a purchase obligation but with a deal structured as such with significant sums, it is clear that the direction being taken by Milan is to redeem the player (in a similar manner done by Inter with Sensi and Politano). Brescia also receives 10% of a future sale of Tonali.
